title: Filters do not apply to Goals Widget
excerpt:
Hi there, 
I´ve seen that the global filter of my dashboard does not change the data of my Goals widget. I.E., I have a monthly sales target of 20 M $, the widget pulls all data of my board instead of applying the filter…

posts.author: egronberger (Erik Gronberger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I´ve seen that the global filter of my dashboard does not change the data of my Goals widget. I.E., I have a monthly sales target of 20 M $, the widget pulls all data of my board instead of applying the filter for current month.

Is there a workaround for this?

Many thanks

posts.author: Jonathan_Janacek (Jonathan Janacek)
posts.cookedHtml: @egronberger Have you figured out a solution to this yet? I need this same thing.

posts.author: egronberger (Erik Gronberger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jonathan_Janacek !

I haven´t found a solution yet, unfortunately. Let´s see if there is a solution for this in the future.

Have a great time!

posts.author: Alammulia1 (Alammulia1)
posts.cookedHtml: After so long, did Monday.com update on this feature?

posts.author: MattHand (Matt)
posts.cookedHtml: Looks like this is still busted. Any chance the filters get fixed on this anytime soon? It’s been a few years and it’s a pretty simple widget.
